issuance_abuse_controls.rate_table: safepay_quote_rate_limits(scope TEXT, client_key TEXT, window_start INTEGER, count INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(scope, client_key, window_start))

client_identity.trusted_proxy_configuration: SAFEPAY_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS is a comma-separated list parsed at startup; production must set it explicitly and invalid CIDRs fail startup

reservation_table.name: safepay_quote_issue_reservations
required_columns: state TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(state IN ('pending','completed','failed'))

quote_hash.encoding: domain || lp(quote_id) || lp(proposal_id) || lp(resource_id) || lp(network) || payee_account_hash_raw_32 || amount_motes_U512_fixed_64_be || correlation_id_u64_be || lp(report_version) || report_hash_raw_32 || expires_at_u64_be || quote_nonce_raw_32

fulfillment_hash.encoding: domain || quote_hash_raw_32 || payment_hash_raw_32 || block_hash_raw_32 || block_height_u64_be || report_hash_raw_32 || consumed_at_unix_seconds_u64_be

required_columns: report_hash TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES safepay_reports(report_hash)
decoded_length INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(decoded_length = length(report_bytes) AND decoded_length >= 0 AND decoded_length <= 262144)

capability_payload.typed_payload_encoding: u32_be(schema_version=1) || uuid_16_raw(capability_id) || lp_ascii(scenario_id) || u64_be(issued_at) || u64_be(expires_at) || client_binding_hash_raw_32 || nonce_raw_32

payment_payload.accepted_equality: exact_structural_equality_after_canonical_decimal_and_account_validation; no extra keys except the frozen extra object

hash_encodings.payment_requirements_hash: BLAKE2b-256(ASCII(CONCORDIA_PAYMENT_REQUIREMENTS_V1) || 0x00 || lp(scheme) || lp(network) || wcspr_package_raw_32 || value_U256_fixed_32_be || payee_account_hash_raw_32 || maxTimeoutSeconds_u32_be || lp(token_name) || lp(eip712_domain_version) || token_decimals_u8 || lp(token_symbol))
hash_encodings.signed_payment_payload_hash: BLAKE2b-256(ASCII(CONCORDIA_SIGNED_PAYMENT_PAYLOAD_V1) || 0x00 || paymentPayload.x402Version_u32_be || lp(resource.url) || lp(resource.description) || lp(resource.mimeType) || payment_requirements_hash_raw_32 || lp(signature_raw_65) || canonical_Casper_PublicKey || payer_account_hash_raw_32 || payee_account_hash_raw_32 || value_U256_fixed_32_be || validAfter_u64_be || validBefore_u64_be || nonce_raw_32 || u32_be(0_for_empty_extensions))

ledger.reconciliation_rule: after_restart_or_lost_HTTP_response_reconcile_by_payer_authorization_nonce_and_recorded_transaction_hash; never issue a blind second settlement
